1.content:
Hey Bart yes Maggie did you meet my boyfriend. Um Maggie I already know you're dating Milhouse, because Lisa told me and of course I know him because he's my best friend. Hey Bart this a kickass party for your sister Maggie's 18th birthday. Hey um Bart do you know where my sexy hot girlfriend is, yes I do Milhouse and will you quit saying that about my baby sister Maggie. What happens next between Milhouse and Maggie at her 18th birthday party?

(a) they have their first official romantic date in her bedroom.
(b) they celebrate being boyfriend and girlfriend by having sex.
(c) Milhouse and Maggie decided to get married when she turns 21 at her birthday party.
1.title: Milhouse and Maggie ask Bart if he met their date

11.content: Wow Maggie this so romantic isn't it, yes it sure is romantic and maybe a little too romantic she says as she runs her hand through his hair and rests her other hand on his crotch. Woah there Maggie lets just stick to the romantic evening. Does Maggie agree or disagree and try to get her hand on his penis?
11.title: (a)

12.content:
Yea I can't believe I'm about have sex with Barts' sister. Um Milhouse which sister are you talking about having sex with. I'm talking about having it with his second sister. Which is of course you Maggie, now don't get me wrong but I did want to have sex with Lisa but that obviously would never happen since she didn't like me the same way you like me Maggie.

So am I going to put my penis in your vagina first or are we going to play with. When all of a sudden Maggie strips naked and then strips Milhouse naked, and then she immediately puts his penis in her vagina and begins to move back and fourth. Wow Maggie I honestly don't think your sister could pleasure me the way you're pleasuring me. When all of a sudden they hear someone crying outside Maggie's room. Followed by an ay caramba what's wrong Lisa, nothing's wrong Bart. Lisa it doesn't sound like nothing's wrong too me Lisa. Ok Bart it's just that my ex crush is saying that Maggie is a better lover even if I loved Milhouse the way Maggie does. How does Bart react?

(a) he breaks her bedroom door open and pulls her off Milhouse.
(b) he tells Milhouse to get his penis out of his baby sister Maggies' vagina and come into the hallway apologize to Lisa
(c) he tells Milhouse to apologize to Lisa and then go home.
(d) he takes Maggie to his treehouse and tell Milhouse apologize and hug Lisa, while he has a chat with Maggie.
12.title: (b)

13.content:
Bart and Lisa are glad Milhouse finally found someone to be his girlfriend and are surprised at just how in love Maggie is with her older sister's crush/older brother's best friend. Ay caramba Lisa Milhouse and Maggie really love each other, yes they do Bart.

So a few months go by and it's their 1 year anniversary as boyfriend and girlfriend, and so Milhouse takes Maggie on a romantic cruise to Italy and France. Wow I can't believe it that Milhouse and Maggie are going on a cruise together. Damn it that could have been me if I liked Milhouse like Maggie does.

So a year later Maggie and Milhouse tour the country following their favorite bands. The day before Maggie's 20th birthday Bart and Lisa receive tickets to a sold out concert of their favorite rock bands. Bart and Lisa start wondering how the hell did Maggie and Milhouse manage to get us these kickass front row and vip access cards to a sold out rock concert featuring our favorite rock bands. Hold on a second Bart there's a note attached, to Bart and Lisa I'm playing the guitar during the concert and Milhouse is running the special effects at laser light shows. Ay caramba Lisa that's how they got the tickets for us. Wow Bart you're right, wait Lisa what for Bart because we need to pack our suit cases and drive to the airport. No we just have pack our suit cases Lisa, because Maggie and Milhouse sent a limo to take us straight to one of our favorite rock band's private jet and get this Lisa. Maggie, Milhouse, and band members are waiting on the jet.

Wow this is amazing Milhouse and Maggie, o it's about to get even better. Once they land they are taken to a hotel that is completely booked for the concert, but once they walk inside the hotel they are immediately escorted to the VIP suite that takes up the entire top floor and even has a private helicopter pad.

So when it's time for the concert they all get in the helicopter and fly straight to the concert. Wow Bart this amazing, yes it surely is Lisa. So as the concert starts Lisa and Bart are shocked at the amazing job their friend Milhouse and their sister Maggie are doing. So at the end of the concert Maggie and Milhouse thank the bands for letting them join and help out. When all of a sudden the bands ask Milhouse and Maggie how the met and they ask Maggie how did she learn to play music like that.

Will for starters we would like to ask the to people who helped us the most. Come on up here Lisa and Bart Simpson. Ay caramba Lisa they want us up on stage, and so Lisa and Bart walk onto the stage. First of all we would like to thank Bart for being friends with Milhouse because without his friendship, me and Milhouse wouldn't even know each other. Second I personally want to thank my sister Lisa for getting me hooked on music and playing music, and even though we play different instruments doesn't mean that I'm better than her. In fact Milhouse go grab my back up instrument. Omg is that my saxophone, at caramba Lisa that is your saxophone. How did it get here when I left it at the hotel, Maggie must have grabbed it. Here you go Lisa now lets play one last song.

So when the song was over, everyone was shocked and amazed at how well Lisa and Maggie played together especially when they switched instruments halfway through the song. Wow just wow that was amazing and we can tell that you both learned the saxophone by yourself, and Lisa Maggie told us that you always were playing the saxophone around the house and even let Maggie play it but when you just started playing her guitar like it was your own instrument. Well that's the power of being able to self teach yourself new instruments just from hearing and seeing someone else playing it. Hey Maggie yes Lisa how about we play happy birthday together, woah whose birthday is it. It's our sister Maggie's 20th birthday and this concert is probably one of the best birthday party ideas she's ever had.

So birthday girl what are you planning for your next birthday party. Well it's going to be almost the same, but me and Milhouse are throwing a combo party because I'm getting married to him on my birthday. Wow that's going to be some party, o it will be full of rock band concerts. That's all I can think of now but it will be a kickass party.

The story picks up in Milhouse's and Maggie's kickass wedding.

https://www.writing.com/main/interactive...
13.title: (c)

info.brief_description: Bart tells Milhouse to give up on asking his sister Lisa. Bart he's not here for Lisa!
info.description:
So after 18 years of rejection by Bart's sister Lisa. Milhouse thinks he'll never have a crush on another girl like the one he had on Lisa. When all of a sudden at Maggie's 18th birthday, Milhouse's jaw drops of course the right girl for him was ten years younger not two years younger. Wow Maggie you look hot and sexy, hey Milhouse once all the guests the go home and my parents and siblings go to sleep these are all yours to enjoy. She then quickly flashes her breasts and vagina for Milhouse.

So halfway through the party Bart hears Milhouse saying Mrs. Van houten, Milhouse why are you saying that when you don't even have a girlfriend. Yes he does Bart, no he doesn't Lisa because you don't have him as your boyfriend. I know that Bart but I was simply implying that Milhouse and Maggie are boyfriend and girlfriend. Well that explains why Maggie was greeting Milhouse in a very sexy dress and acting all sexy around him.
